scripts.contract:sync: bun run contract:export && bun run contract:generate
scripts.affected: NX_DAEMON=false NX_INTERACTIVE=false bunx nx affected -t lint typecheck test build
scripts.affected:e2e: NX_DAEMON=false NX_INTERACTIVE=false bunx nx affected -t e2e
scripts.db:up:redis: docker compose --profile redis up -d postgres redis
scripts.db:up:debug: docker compose --profile redis --profile debug up -d postgres redis redis-commander
scripts.db:down: docker compose --profile redis --profile debug --profile jobs down --remove-orphans
scripts.db:down:volumes: docker compose --profile redis --profile debug --profile jobs down --remove-orphans -v
scripts.shared:smoke: bun run contract:sync && bun run --cwd packages/api-client check:generated && bun run workspace:conformance

*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,mjs,cjs}: cross-env NX_DAEMON=false NX_INTERACTIVE=false bunx nx affected -t lint typecheck test --files
